item.title: GODSPEED NRFO [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED NRFO [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED NRFO
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h2][color=#FF0000] NO ROOT FULL OPTIMIZATION [/color][color=#008000] NRFO [/color][/h2]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b] COMBO [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2068290/]1.Fix aim boost [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2056054/]2.GSM NOROR [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2040463/]3.GAME SPACE [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]




"NO ROOT FULL OPTIMIZATION" (NRFO), a cutting-edge optimizer developed by revWhiteShadow specifically designed to enhance the gaming experience on non-rooted Android devices.

NRFO is a revolutionary solution that eliminates the need for rooting your device while still delivering exceptional performance improvements. With NRFO, gamers can unlock the full potential of their Android devices, allowing them to play demanding games smoothly, without any lag or slowdowns.

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. Moreover, NRFO includes a Game Turbo feature that further boosts gaming performance by optimizing graphics settings and reducing input lag.

With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. It empowers gamers to play their favorite games at their full potential, ensuring smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and an overall enhanced gaming experience.

Revolutionize your non-rooted Android gaming experience with NRFO and unlock the true gaming potential of your device. Get ready to embark on gaming adventures like never before!
[read more]
item.description:
GODSPEED NRFO
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

"NO ROOT FULL OPTIMIZATION" (NRFO), a cutting-edge optimizer developed by revWhiteShadow specifically designed to enhance the gaming experience on non-rooted Android devices.

NRFO is a revolutionary solution that eliminates the need for rooting your device while still delivering exceptional performance improvements. With NRFO, gamers can unlock the full potential of their Android devices, allowing them to play demanding games smoothly, without any lag or slowdowns.

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. Moreover, NRFO includes a Game Turbo feature that further boosts gaming performance by optimizing graphics settings and reducing input lag.

With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. It empowers gamers to play their favorite games at their full potential, ensuring smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and an overall enhanced gaming experience.

Revolutionize your non-rooted Android gaming experience with NRFO and unlock the true gaming potential of your device. Get ready to embark on gaming adventures like never before!
[read more]

"NO ROOT FULL OPTIMIZATION" (NRFO), a cutting-edge optimizer developed by revWhiteShadow specifically designed to enhance the gaming experience on non-rooted Android devices.

NRFO is a revolutionary solution that eliminates the need for rooting your device while still delivering exceptional performance improvements. With NRFO, gamers can unlock the full potential of their Android devices, allowing them to play demanding games smoothly, without any lag or slowdowns.

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. Moreover, NRFO includes a Game Turbo feature that further boosts gaming performance by optimizing graphics settings and reducing input lag.

With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. It empowers gamers to play their favorite games at their full potential, ensuring smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and an overall enhanced gaming experience.

Revolutionize your non-rooted Android gaming experience with NRFO and unlock the true gaming potential of your device. Get ready to embark on gaming adventures like never before!
[read more]

item.title: Gopeed [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Gopeed [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Gopeed
(Internet Apps)
A modern download manager that supports all platforms. Built with Golang and Flutter.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

(Internet Apps)
A modern download manager that supports all platforms. Built with Golang and Flutter.

https://github.com/decipher3114

item.title: Passy - Offline Password Manager [Notes]
item.itunes:title: Passy - Offline Password Manager [Notes]
item.itunes:author: glitterware
item.itunes:summary:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]
item.description:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]

item.title: GAMWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAMWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAMWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The GamWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance the gaming experience on Android devices. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, it provides users with a range of optimizations and features aimed at delivering maximum gaming performance.
This module offers performance enhancements such as CPU and GPU optimizations, RAM management improvements, and system tweaks that prioritize gaming resources. It also provides options to reduce background processes, minimize input lag, and optimize network connectivity for smoother online gaming.

GamWing's focus on maximizing gaming experience ensures that gamers can enjoy faster load times, higher frame rates, and reduced stuttering while playing their favorite mobile games. With its ease of installation and customization, the GamWing Magisk module is a go-to solution for gamers looking to elevate their Android gaming performance to the next level.
[read more]
item.description:
GAMWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The GamWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance the gaming experience on Android devices. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, it provides users with a range of optimizations and features aimed at delivering maximum gaming performance.
This module offers performance enhancements such as CPU and GPU optimizations, RAM management improvements, and system tweaks that prioritize gaming resources. It also provides options to reduce background processes, minimize input lag, and optimize network connectivity for smoother online gaming.

GamWing's focus on maximizing gaming experience ensures that gamers can enjoy faster load times, higher frame rates, and reduced stuttering while playing their favorite mobile games. With its ease of installation and customization, the GamWing Magisk module is a go-to solution for gamers looking to elevate their Android gaming performance to the next level.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GAMWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The GamWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance the gaming experience on Android devices. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, it provides users with a range of optimizations and features aimed at delivering maximum gaming performance.
This module offers performance enhancements such as CPU and GPU optimizations, RAM management improvements, and system tweaks that prioritize gaming resources. It also provides options to reduce background processes, minimize input lag, and optimize network connectivity for smoother online gaming.

GamWing's focus on maximizing gaming experience ensures that gamers can enjoy faster load times, higher frame rates, and reduced stuttering while playing their favorite mobile games. With its ease of installation and customization, the GamWing Magisk module is a go-to solution for gamers looking to elevate their Android gaming performance to the next level.
[read more]

item.title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: dim4ugan
item.itunes:summary:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]
item.description:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]

item.title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: t3sl4
item.itunes:summary:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass both Basic and Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]
item.description:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass both Basic and Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass both Basic and Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]

item.title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME SPACE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.
Hey there, fellow gamers! Have you heard the exciting news? The Nubia Red Magic's Game Space has been expertly ported for all Android devices, thanks to the amazing work of RevWhiteShadow. If you're a mobile gaming enthusiast like me, this is something you definitely don't want to miss out on!

So, what exactly is the Game Space? Let me break it down for you. This innovative feature is designed to optimize your device specifically for gaming, providing you with an unparalleled gaming experience. It works by enhancing your device's performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay, all in one convenient space.

Imagine diving into your favorite mobile games without having to worry about lags or interruptions. That's exactly what the Game Space offers. With its expertly ported version, you can enjoy lightning-fast speeds and precision like never before. It's truly the ultimate playground for mobile gamers.

Now, let's address some common questions you might have about the Game Space:

1. What games are compatible with Game Space?
Game Space is compatible with a wide range of mobile games, from popular titles to indie gems. Whether you're into action, adventure, strategy, or racing games, you'll find something to love in the Game Space library.

2. How does Game Space enhance gaming performance?
Game Space optimizes your device's resources to ensure smooth and seamless gameplay. It minimizes background processes, allocates more CPU and GPU power to your games, and prioritizes network connectivity, all of which contribute to an enhanced gaming experience.

3. Can I customize Game Space settings to suit my preferences?
Absolutely! Game Space allows you to customize various settings according to your preferences. You can adjust performance settings, enable or disable notifications, and even create custom profiles for different games.

4. Is Game Space safe to use?
Yes, Game Space is completely safe to use. It's been thoroughly tested and vetted to ensure that it meets the highest standards of security and performance.

So, what are you waiting for? Take your mobile gaming experience to the next level with the Game Space ported for all Android devices. Trust me, once you try it, you'll wonder how you ever gamed without it!
[read more]

The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.
Hey there, fellow gamers! Have you heard the exciting news? The Nubia Red Magic's Game Space has been expertly ported for all Android devices, thanks to the amazing work of RevWhiteShadow. If you're a mobile gaming enthusiast like me, this is something you definitely don't want to miss out on!

So, what exactly is the Game Space? Let me break it down for you. This innovative feature is designed to optimize your device specifically for gaming, providing you with an unparalleled gaming experience. It works by enhancing your device's performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay, all in one convenient space.

Imagine diving into your favorite mobile games without having to worry about lags or interruptions. That's exactly what the Game Space offers. With its expertly ported version, you can enjoy lightning-fast speeds and precision like never before. It's truly the ultimate playground for mobile gamers.

Now, let's address some common questions you might have about the Game Space:

1. What games are compatible with Game Space?
Game Space is compatible with a wide range of mobile games, from popular titles to indie gems. Whether you're into action, adventure, strategy, or racing games, you'll find something to love in the Game Space library.

2. How does Game Space enhance gaming performance?
Game Space optimizes your device's resources to ensure smooth and seamless gameplay. It minimizes background processes, allocates more CPU and GPU power to your games, and prioritizes network connectivity, all of which contribute to an enhanced gaming experience.

3. Can I customize Game Space settings to suit my preferences?
Absolutely! Game Space allows you to customize various settings according to your preferences. You can adjust performance settings, enable or disable notifications, and even create custom profiles for different games.

4. Is Game Space safe to use?
Yes, Game Space is completely safe to use. It's been thoroughly tested and vetted to ensure that it meets the highest standards of security and performance.

So, what are you waiting for? Take your mobile gaming experience to the next level with the Game Space ported for all Android devices. Trust me, once you try it, you'll wonder how you ever gamed without it!

item.title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: meoify
item.itunes:summary:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!
Compatible with android 8.0+

Channel: @meoify
Discussion: @meoifydiscussion

My YouTube : https://youtube.com/channel/UCHqdpfbTJENnYdQ-OfyK5WQ
[read more]
